# 🚀 Pull Request Template

## 📝 Related Issue
Closes #

## 📋 Summary
Provide a brief summary of the changes made and the problem they solve.

## 🛠️ Changes Made
- [ ] Description of change 1
- [ ] Description of change 2

## 🧪 Testing Verification
Detail how these changes were tested:
- **Local Testing**: (e.g., tested on local Flask server, endpoint `/sip` responds correctly)
- **Responsiveness**: (e.g., tested sidebar layout under 800px on simulated mobile device)
- **Code Quality**: (e.g., ran linter or syntax compilation checks)

## 📸 Screenshots / Demos
*If UI changes are included, add before/after screenshots or GIFs.*

## 🌟 Impact
How does this contribution improve the repository?

## 🏁 Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project conventions and style guidelines
- [ ] Tested locally and verified correctness
- [ ] Contains no unrelated or extraneous formatting changes
- [ ] Mobile responsive layout verified (for frontend work)
- [ ] Accessibility standards met
- [ ] Security standards followed (no hardcoded keys/secrets)
